description_long: This object is a classic hot dog featuring a plump sausage nestled inside a soft, lightly browned bun. The bun has a slightly uneven, rustic texture with a golden-brown top and a paler underside. The sausage is partially visible along the lengthwise split of the bun, with a reddish-brown color and a moist sheen. A visible line of yellow mustard runs along the top of the sausage, with a streak of red ketchup beside it, both slightly absorbed into the bread. The ends of the sausage are tucked into the bun, and there are no visible grill marks or packaging. The overall appearance suggests a freshly prepared street food item, ready to be eaten in an urban park or at a sidewalk vendor.
description: A classic hot dog with a sausage in a soft, golden-brown bun, topped with mustard and ketchup.
description_view_0: Side view showing the rounded, lightly browned bun with a hint of sausage and condiments peeking from the top.
description_view_1: End view highlighting the exposed sausage tip and a clear view of mustard and ketchup along the bun's split.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, with the bun's texture and a subtle glimpse of condiments visible.
description_view_3: End view from the opposite side, showing the other tip of the sausage and the condiments along the bun's opening.
